form.formComment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Warragul, the latest when beaten 4.5 lengths behind Romp Tin over 400m. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Warragul, the latest when beaten 4.5 lengths behind Romp Tin over 400m. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Was well supported last time and gave a sight after a strong early split but weakened late to finish a 2.5 lengths fourth (22.69) over 390m at this track. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was well supported last time and gave a sight after a strong early split but weakened late to finish a 2.5 lengths fourth (22.69) over 390m at this track. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.3 lengths at Healesville over 300m (17.02) beating Herbie in Grade 5 on March 27. Looks well placed and should be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 1.3 lengths at Healesville over 300m (17.02) beating Herbie in Grade 5 on March 27. Looks well placed and should be tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight; Proved difficult to box.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on March 31 over 410m at Horsham behind Paw Farina beaten 7 lengths (23.86). Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on March 31 over 410m at Horsham behind Paw Farina beaten 7 lengths (23.86). Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.55) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 6 length fifth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last three starts, the latest when second (22.58) at this track. Drawn wide. Cannot be ruled out.

formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last three starts, the latest when second (22.58) at this track. Drawn wide. Cannot be ruled out.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 3.5 lengths over 305m at Mt Gambier (17.51). Racing well and can win again.
